caseName: Home Depot U.S.A., Inc. v. Bauer
caseNameFull: HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. v. Michael BAUER, et ux.
attorneys: Motion of The Product Liability Advisory Council, Inc. for leave to file a brief as amicus curiae granted.
